title: Dinguz's FPS+
body:
## What is Dinguz's FPS+?
Dinguz's FPS+ is a modpack that optimizes your game, from better chunk loading to even fixing item pixel gap. More simply it adds Frames Per Second [FPS] so your game runs smoothly.
## What is making your game run smooth?
**SODIUM** "Sodium is a powerful rendering engine and optimization mod for Minecraft."
![sodium](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/120011f9344dfe7f833311de07625916a6c6f03b.png)
